one_sentence_fix: Rebuild the S3 beluga to read as a dimensional cold-rim-lit animal rather than a flat illustration (recover the GPU PBR path or hand-shade a gradient-mesh with real volume), and fill the dead lower-thirds on S3/S5/S8.
editor_notes: No hard fails; ships at 8.77 vs 8.3. Caveats disclosed in the email: (1) the S3 beluga hero is the designed Canvas fallback because the akthree GPU snapshot sentinel false-negatived on the transparent subject, and it reads flat (the deck's weakest surface). (2) Honesty is clean: no invented detection-accuracy percentage, the 331 count is hedged (may be stabilizing, still about three quarters below 1979), and the S8 boundary box shows noise/prey/habitat with no intake port.
